# Identify behaviors*Created: Monday, October 20, 2025 at 12:22:32?PM*<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">Identify behaviors </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">Routine - </span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">standard pattern of bed </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">now we getting ready for bed </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">transitional music, play some calming music </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">play music for 20 minutes - </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">give each other a hug, see you in the morning </span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">some sort of end of day, what is your favorite thing today wasÉ </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">Make a checklist </span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">have pictures in her bedroom - toothbrush, </span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 16px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<ul>
<ul>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">How are you feeling, are you tired? </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">imagine you are holding a ball, and whoever is holding the ball you can talk </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">Hot Potatoe </span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">when you are talking</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">focus that matter to us the most during bed </span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">first week - march up the stairs together</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">bathtime, make it fun</span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 22px">Point System &amp Hot Potatoe</span><span style="font-size: 20px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 20px">What makes you think you have bad memory, re write that narrative, give her a task of memory </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 20px">break it into parts (memory) a story you can write, pick up something from school - walking out the door, mnemonics strategy - song or an image in her mind. </span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 20px">Work with the narrative - </span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Leila I want to hear you but i cannot hear you:</div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>Leila letŐs sit down and have a calm voices, calm hands and calm feet, letŐs breathe together - want to sit on my lap, we can breathe together - give her a hug, what about giving yourself a hug, side by side - breath with her - letŐs hug and breathe together. Leila that was helpful, that was so helpful, thank you for using a calm voice, when you speak calmly i can hear you better, because I am not feeling defensive. </div>
